title: Document knowledge (RAG)
subtitle: Index folders of documents so the AI can answer from your own files, with citations.

index.title: Index a folder
index.subtitle: Build embeddings from .txt, .md, and .pdf files in a folder (searched recursively).
index.pathHelp: This path must exist on the server running the backend, not on your computer.
index.indexingHint: Building embeddings — this can take a moment.
index.reindexNote: Indexing a name that already exists replaces it.

collections.title: Collections
collections.emptyDescription: Index a folder above to create your first collection.
collections.updateHint: Re-index this collection's folder to pick up new or changed files
collections.filesEmpty: No files found in this collection.

errors.noSource: Couldn't determine this collection's source folder.
errors.files: Could not load the file list.
errors.collectionInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
